name: Inseego Corp.
description: Inseego Corp. is a leader in the design and development of high-performance mobile broadband, fixed wireless access, and software-as-a-service (SaaS) solutions. The company's portfolio includes 5G and 4G LTE enterprise gateways, industrial routers, mobile hotspots, and telematics solutions. Inseego's products enable secure, reliable, and high-speed wireless connectivity for businesses, governments, and consumers worldwide, supported by advanced cloud management software that simplifies device deployment and monitoring.
